features.evidence: From the moment I powered it on, the speed and responsiveness were incredible — everything loads almost instantly and multitasking is effortless If you’re looking for a powerful, future-ready laptop that will handle upcoming Windows upgrades with ease, the Dell XPS 13 is absolutely worth it
This is a great computer at a very fair price I have not run into any issues and after using this machine I think the price is well worth it

Powerful computer with a long long, long battery life and size and weight that's perfect for traveling I also love how lightweight and premium it feels, yet the battery easily lasts through a full day
value: average battery life in hours: 18 Hours
